## Description

<!-- What changed and why -->

Fixes #(issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] docs — documentation
- [ ] test — testing
- [ ] chore — build, CI, dependencies
- [ ] sec — security fix
- [ ] infra — infrastructure change

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing completed

## Security

- [ ] No new dependencies with known vulnerabilities
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in code
- [ ] SAST/SCA scans passed
- [ ] OPA policy validation passed

## Documentation

- [ ] ADR updated if architectural change
- [ ] README updated if user-facing change
- [ ] API docs updated if endpoint change

## Migration

- [ ] Backwards compatible
- [ ] Migration path documented

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows language-specific standards (ruff, mypy)
- [ ] Error handling covers failure modes (network, auth, rate limits, timeouts)
- [ ] Logging at appropriate levels
- [ ] No TODO/FIXME without issue references
- [ ] PR is under 400 lines changed
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commits format
